title: linaria bipartita var. linogrisea
intro: Linaria bipartita var. linogrisea, also known as self-heal, is a perennial herb belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of southern China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Linaria bipartita var. linogrisea include wound healing, reducing fever and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, self-heal is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
